nasb.text: Therefore, I will make you go into exile beyond Damascus,” says the Lord, whose name is the God of hosts.

esv.text: and I will send you into exile beyond Damascus,” says the Lord, whose name is the God of hosts.

cnv.text: 我必使你們被擄，流亡到大馬士革以外。這是耶和華說的，萬軍的　神就是他的名。

ccb.text: 所以，我要使你们被掳到大马士革以外的地方。” 这是耶和华说的，祂的名字是万军之上帝。
